case_title: THEODORE CAMPBELL JR VS. MARCOS C ALFARO et al

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-28-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF THEODORE CAMPBELL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 6/13/14. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
